creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 181700
svn diff to upgrade to 0.20

gohugo has been updated to 0.20 (https://github.com/spf13/hugo/releases/tag/v0.20)

The attached svn diff brings this port up from 0.19 to 0.20

Tested against 10.3-RELEASE and 11.0-RELEASE, no issues building manually/poudriere. Poudriere logs attached.


root@freebsd-11:~/gohugo # portlint -AC
looks fine.
